elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon person wearing casual clothes stands confidently, pointing at a clipboard with a checklist titled 'Debt Payoff Plan'.
elements.image_prompt: A smiling cartoon character, rendered in a modern, friendly 2D illustration style, wearing casual clothes such as a t-shirt and jeans, standing confidently with one hand pointing towards a clipboard. The clipboard prominently displays a checklist titled 'Debt Payoff Plan' with checkmarks on some items. Clean, bright, flat vector art with bold outlines and solid colors. Pure white background. No shading or gradients, high contrast, professional minimalist icon aesthetic.

elements.original_description: A stack of colorful bills and coins with a downward arrow pointing toward a piggy bank, indicating paying down debt.
elements.image_prompt: A stack of colorful paper bills and metallic coins, arranged neatly, with a bold, simple downward arrow pointing directly towards a classic ceramic piggy bank. The arrow and money stack visually indicate the action of paying down debt. Professional 2D minimalist icon, clean flat vector art with solid, vibrant colors. Pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, crisp lines.
